content.observe: Not everyone runs at once. Everyone waits in line somewhere — a job queue, a ready queue, a device queue — until it's their turn at the CPU.
content.fault: You expected to run immediately and instead landed in a queue behind three others. That's not a bug. That's scheduling.

hotspots.label: Job Queue
hotspots.detail: Every process that has entered the system, waiting to be admitted.

hotspots.label: Ready Queue
hotspots.detail: Processes loaded in memory, waiting only for CPU time.

hotspots.label: CPU
hotspots.detail: Executes whichever process the scheduler selects next.

hotspots.label: Waiting Queue
hotspots.detail: Processes blocked on I/O or an event, set aside until they're ready again.
